title: docs: use "containers-" prefix and add containers-mounts.conf
body:
- docs: use "containers-" prefix for registries and storage
 - docs: add containers-mounts.conf(5)

comments.body: We need similar changes for Buildah and Skopeo (Cc: @mtrmac @runcom). I already have a PR open against CRI-O.

> I know a lot of this was cut/paste, but if you could considert changing it, I'd appreciate it.

With pleasure! Thanks for the reviews, @TomSweeneyRedHat and @giuseppe !
@TomSweeneyRedHat, @giuseppe, I addressed your comments and also renamed the file to `*.5.md` to make it adhere to `make docs`.
